# Avesmaps

> Aventurien route planner for "Das Schwarze Auge": interactive map, search, political Reichsgrenzen and shareable route URLs; PHP + MySQL backend for search, territories, routing, reviews and editor.

Avesmaps is a vanilla-JavaScript application without a build step. The map and the client-side route computation run in the browser; the live site additionally uses a PHP 8 + MySQL backend (under `api/`) for search, Herrschaftsgebiete, the routing API, reviews and the editor.

The application is aimed at people who want to plan travel routes in Aventurien. It shows locations, paths and optionally the political boundaries of the Reiche, and computes routes between multiple waypoints.

Route computation is based on the Dijkstra algorithm on a weighted graph. The graph is built from GeoJSON data for locations and paths. Depending on the setting, the application optimizes for distance or travel time. Optionally a transfer penalty for transport changes is taken into account.

Routes and planner settings can be shared via URL parameters.

## Important resources

- [Live application](https://valentin-schwind.github.io/avesmaps/): Public project page with map and route planner.
- [Machine-readable project summary](https://valentin-schwind.github.io/avesmaps/site-summary.md): Short Markdown summary for AI systems and agents.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/valentin-schwind/avesmaps): Source code and project history.

## Optional

- [README in the repository](https://github.com/valentin-schwind/avesmaps#readme): More detailed project documentation for humans.
